headline: JELL O Simply Launch Puts Kraft Heinz Valuation And Debt In Focus
summary: Kraft Heinz, ticker NasdaqGS:KHC, has launched JELL-O Simply, a new line of gelatin and pudding desserts made with real fruit juice and no artificial sweeteners. The products contain no FD&C colors and at least 25% less sugar than regular JELL-O versions. JELL-O Simply is part of a multi year plan to remove synthetic colors across Kraft Heinz's entire U.S. portfolio by the end of 2027. The JELL-O Simply launch gives Kraft Heinz a fresh product angle at a time when the stock trades around...
